CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(Object_Name__c),
"Account", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Customer Data Upload"),
"Employee_Customer_Assignment__c",
HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "DSM/SSA Primary Data Upload"),
"Product_Mapping__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Primary/Secondary Product Mapping"),
"Child_beat__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Beat Data Upload"),
"Junction_Beat__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Beat Items Data Upload"),
"Calendar_beat__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "PJP Data Upload"),
"PJP_Item__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "PJP Item Data Upload"),
"Invoice_item__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Sale Data Upload"),
"Price_Book__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Price Book Data Upload"),
"Password Reset", HYPERLINK("https://workbench.developerforce.com/login.php?startUrl=%2FpwdMgmt.php", "Password Reset"),
"Sales_Channel_To_SKU__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Sales to SKU Mapping"), "TargetActuals__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Target Actuals Data Upload"), "Employee__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Employee Data Upload"),
"Product__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "SKU Data Upload"), "PBIS_Target__c", HYPERLINK("chrome-extension://hpijlohoihegkfehhibggnkbjhoemldh/data-import.html?host=ability-efficiency-3589--sbox2.sandbox.my.salesforce.com&sobject=" &Text(Object_Name__c), "Primary PBIS Data Upload"),
/* Default if nothing matches */ "No Link Available"
)
CustomField.label: Custom Data Upload URL
